title: Immersed Minecraft
description: Completely immersive Minecraft in one modpack, options for all computers
body:
Modpack designed for complete immersion.
First person reccomended. TEXTURE PACK OPTIONS.

## **Lighting Options:**

_Rethinking Voxels (Configurable to any setup)_

_Lamb Dynamic Lights (Turned off in mod settings by default)_



## _**Recommended Settings:**_

**NASA COMPUTER -** High Shader settings template, highest light beam settings, 24 chunk render distance, 10-16 simulation distance

**Good Computer -** High Shader settings or Medium Shader settings (test with your setup in creative before playing), medium light beam settings, 15-24 chunk render distance, 10-16 simulation distance

**Ok Computer -** Low Shader settings or Medium Shader settings (test with your setup in creative before playing), low light beam settings, 10-18 chunk render distance, 8-12 simulation distance

**Trash Computer -** Shaders OFF, Lamb Dynamic Lights ON (esc --> mods --> Lamb...), test chunk settings for best results


## **_Optional Features:_**

**MULTIPLAYER** through Essential Mod (Disabled on Modrinth by default)

**DETAILED TEXTURES** through "Default HD 512x" texture pack
